text: Do you feel that? Oh, shit. Oh, ha, ha, ha, ha. Oh, ha, ha, ha, ha, ha. Browning deep in my sea alone, broken to your servant's eye. Will you give it to me? It seems that the left of my human side is slowly changing in me. Will you give it to me? Looking at my over-inflation, when suddenly it changes. Oh, now there is no turning back now. You've broken up the demons. Get me! Get up, come on, get down with the sickness. Get up, come on, get down with the sickness. Will you give it to me? It seems that all that was good has died at the sticking in me. Will you give it to me? It seems you're having some trouble in dealing with these changes, living with these changes. Oh, now the world is a scary place now that you've broken up the demons. Get me! Get up, come on, get down with the sickness. Get me when I dream. Get me when I dream. Get me when I dream. Get me when I dream! No, honey, don't do it again! Don't do it again! I'll be a good boy! I'll be a good boy! I promise! No, mommy, don't hit me! Ow! I'd have to hit me like that, mommy! Don't do it! You're hurting me! Ow! Why do you have to be such a bitch? Why don't you? Why don't you just fuck up and die? Why can't you just fuck up and die? Why can't you just leave me and die? Never stick your hand in my face, I can't bitch! Fuck you! I don't need this shit! You stupid, sadistic, abusive fucking whore! Would you like to see how it feels, mommy? Here it comes, get ready to die! Oh!eyster, come on. Get up! Come on, get down with the sickness! Get up! Come on, get down with the sickness! Get up! Come on, get down with the sickness! You fuck or you're not? Come on, get down with the sickness! Badness has now come over me! you
